26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @DRashe drew this spooky but still somehow cute scarecrow. They have a ton of other pieces in their posts. Go have a peek.
27 Man Tax: Viggo Mortensen
“There comes a point when a man must refuse to answer to his leader if he is also to answer to his own conscience.” - Hartley Shawcross So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Celebrations!
item.description: #memes #socially_awesome_penguin And from what I can tell, not only am I included in the visa, but I can also work while we are there! Goodbye US. We are fleeing to the one place that hasn’t been corrupted by late stage capitalism! Sweden! /jk @Snooj you wanted to be updated on this.

item.dc:creator: TheWoodsAreVile

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1651 (oh hi noon)
item.description:
Let's get this bread
Ah yes. Orthodox alloy: the construction material used by Alternate Universe Tony Stark for his suit in the universe where he was from Roman Constantinople.
Ah sweet, human-made horrors i can comprehend.
A theory behind the Little Ice Age (and the collapse of Ancestral Pueblo society at the same time) is that the Mongols killed so many people that plants grew back in their farm fields and took up so CO2 that the temperature dropped. I do NOT reccomend this as a solution to our current crisis, no matter how many billionaires suggest it.
Killdeer like to pretend they have a broken wing to lure predators away from their nest/ babies
Cowbirds are wild, man.
And then they grow into new trees!
This. This is the society I dream of as well.
I magically get more confident when wearing a cowboy hat--i look good in them. Also provides Pippin a great place to sit.
Yeaaaaah.
Also yeaaaah.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "I'm sorry. Inconceivable! Good boy Pippin! ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: The UK and its Zionist Interests
item.description:
Dr Rahmeh Aladwan has been arrested for the 5th time for social media posts speaking out against the genocide and Zionist lobby. 7 officers, handcuffs, a van and a car, an overnight hotel stay, then a transfer to London under arrest, all over words, social media posts calling out the Israel lobby. All of it directed at one woman who spoke out against Israel's war crimes and atrocities not only in Gaza, but across the whole region. Dr Rahmeh Aladwan's medical license was also suspended back in November 2025 for 15 months for opposing the genocide in Gaza. She has been taken to Charing Cross police station. If you're in London and able to, please mobilise and show support in calling for her immediate release. You can also call 020 7230 1212 to raise this demand. - UK Fact Check Politics
Edit: if I could remove this screenshot of someone's comment, I would. I don't know who Katie Hopkins nor the context of this is, but I'm conflicted on this given that Iran has a right to defend itself and the UK, US and some other countries are directly responsible for the atrocities in that region.
item.dc:creator: unwaver

item.title: Potato's Daily Dirties
item.description:
am back. am tired. am alive tho. i guess. I am also currently very addicted to plateup so. ya know. will be looking to get some of it going in mah discord at some point.
someone posted dis on one of my other posts when i had posted his one video about just doing whatever you want. ye. im dealing with stuffs today. fun.
The above image was made by the wonderful CammyJay! They have their own channel in the deviousness discord where they share artwork and sometimes do drawings based on word prompts given by members. its a lot of fun! I has a Deviousness discord server! We do have a hard rule of no politics and/or religion. The discord is a safe space to get away from the bullshit going on. We have a bunch of areas including a SFW area, content creator area, a NSFW area and more! We have gaming fun! We have spontaneous gaming and some ping roles for people to use to get groups together based on US and EU time zones! We have movie nights on Saturdays! So feel free to wander in and say haii! Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness If you have issues with link see dis: https://imgur.com/a/8GUNAz4 Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
artist of work above (aside from my signing potato on it): https://florahv.artstation.com/projects/XnL8P3 I am on dis now and trying to remember to linky over there too for when I post and also post the memes that get removed: https://bsky.app/profile/potatocheesmonk.bsky.social I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe #potato #memes #dailydirties #makinmywaydowntown #amawakeandaliveiguess
item.dc:creator: PotatoCheesMonk
